variants: Yara Ben Ali's expertise in Industrial Design has made her a notable contributor to the field, particularly through her influential work, the Solaris Gold Compendium. Under the mentorship of Laurette Besson, Yara cultivated her design skills and innovative thinking. Her accomplishments have earned her the Rising Sable Seal award, recognizing her contributions to the industry. In addition, she is actively engaged with the Quartz Seamstresses Syndicate, collaborating with peers to explore the future of design. Yara's reputation continues to grow as she leads the way in modern design approaches.
